positive: A stylized, symmetrical cosmic wanderer figure, rendered in a geometric, Art Nouveau and vaporwave fusion style. The main subject is a humanoid silhouette adorned with crystalline celestial mechanisms and glowing nebula elements. It floats against a deep indigo and cyan gradient background, suggesting deep space and ethereal energy. The composition is perfectly centered, with strong, clean lines and contrasting glows (magenta, electric blue, teal). Use bold outlines, flat color blocks, and highly contrasting light sources. Suitable for a vintage tapestry or t-shirt print. High saturation, perfect symmetry, cinematic depth.
negative: low resolution, blurry, artifacts, text, signature, logo, watermark, bad anatomy, malformed hands, extra limbs, copyright, messy, noise, gradient fade, disfigured, grainy
